rationale: In the citing paper, Rooderkerk et al. (2011) appears only once in a grouped parenthetical citation alongside Yeung and Soman (2005) to support a general statement that attribute ranges can shape judgments. The paper does not assign this cited work a distinct role in model construction, hypothesis development, estimation strategy, or interpretation of results. Its use is background literature support rather than a specific building block for the IAM framework.
